issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnAttack' not 'Activated'. Card effect triggers when attacking, not via activation cost.
Action type 'RevealFromHand' is incorrect. Should 'RevealFromDeck' (reveal from top of deck, not hand). RevealFromHand reveals cards already in hand.
Filter logic is inverted. Should reveal ANY card from deck top, then add up to 1 FILM-type card to hand. Current DSL only reveals FILM cards.
Missing action to place non-FILM cards at bottom of deck. DSL only has SearchDeck but lacks the return-to-bottom-of-deck action.
'Once Per Turn' restriction not encoded in DSL. Should add turn-limit tracking or condition.
